description: Sequence input (DADA2/FASTA), BLAST search, match standardization

functions.name: read_sequence_table
functions.description: Ingest DADA2 seqtab matrix, FASTA file, or DNAStringSet; optional taxonomy join

inputs.name: data
inputs.description: Sequence table, FASTA path, or DNAStringSet

output.description: Data frame with observation_id, sequence columns

functions.scaling_note: I/O bound; fast for typical eDNA datasets

functions.name: filter_sequences
functions.description: Filter ASVs by length range and minimum abundance

inputs.name: barcode_term
inputs.description: Barcode marker for auto length detection

functions.name: blast_sequences
functions.description: Remote NCBI BLAST or local rBLAST; score window filtering; taxonomy resolution

inputs.name: score_range
inputs.description: Keep hits within this % of top hit per query

output.description: Match data with score, accession, taxonomy

functions.scaling_note: Remote BLAST: ~2-5 min per batch of 50 sequences. Local: ~30 sec per 100 sequences

functions.name: standardize_match_data
functions.description: Standardize any match table to the canonical match_df format

inputs.name: data
inputs.description: Raw match data with score and taxonomy columns

output.description: Standardized match object with observation_id, score, taxon_name, taxon_name_rank, taxonomy columns

functions.name: filter_redundant_hypotheses
functions.description: Drop higher-rank rows superseded by finer-rank rows within same lineage + observation_id
